global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language.
must_have: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: 这不是又一条“国产模型上新”的热闹消息。Latent Space 在 2026 年 3 月 19 日点出的重点很直接：MiniMax 2.7 的价值不在参数表，而在它把“能不能用”迅速改写成了“为什么还不用更便宜的那一个”。
scene_elements: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
left-vs-right split board with one decisive divider
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only

on_canvas_text.headline: 把同级开源模型的成本打到了三

visual_constraints: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: latentspacepod Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent. Style…

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 很多模型发布，热度都死在标题里。这次不太一样。2026 年 3 月 19 日，`@latentspacepod` 转发的 AINews 用一句很硬的概括把重点钉住了：**MiniMax 2.7，追平 GLM-5，同级成本只要三分之一**。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point

on_canvas_text.headline: 这不是又一条“国产模型…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这不是又一条“国产模型上新”的热闹消息。Latent… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 模型圈很容易把“追平”写成一件平淡的事，好像只要不是绝对领先，就只是第二名新闻。但实际落地里，很多团队并不需要“唯一最强”的模型，他们需要的是**足够强，同时更容易部署、更能控成本、更适合进生产环境**的模型。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_02 to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point

on_canvas_text.headline: 真正值得看的，不是追平…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 真正值得看的，不是追平，而是追平的方式 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 第一类是已经在比较开源模型、但预算始终压得很紧的团队。你未必需要再多一点纸面领先，你更需要的是把同等级能力放进现有预算里。标题里那句“1/3 cost”之所以刺眼，就是因为它直接对应采购、调用量和持续运营成本。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_03 to reset attention at this section transition.

on_canvas_text.headline: 这条消息对谁最有用
on_canvas_text.subheadline: 这张图只回答怎么判断

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset

Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-infographic: comparison-matrix. Use decision matrix layout with clear criteria and recommendation signal.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: 这类消息最容易出现两种误读。第一种误读是，只看见“又一个新版本”，然后自动归类为厂商例行发版。第二种误读是，只看见“追平 SOTA”，于是把它当成排行榜新闻。
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_04 to reset attention at this section transition.
